focus_points.label: Payments refactor win and how it landed
focus_points.reason: Whether the big payments refactor win is being felt and credited internally, and what they want repeated or amplified going forward.

focus_points.label: How they’re showing up with the team
focus_points.reason: Whether the quieter-than-usual standup is just a normal rhythm shift or something worth clarifying—could be energy, focus on a hard follow-on, or simply less to report this week.

focus_points.label: Mentoring plans and what they'd own
focus_points.reason: Whether they're ready to take mentoring back up now that the refactor is out, and what “more mentoring” means in concrete terms (who, how often, and what outcomes).

focus_points.label: Billing rewrite expectations and stakeholder prep
focus_points.reason: Whether they have the information and context they need for next quarter’s billing rewrite so they can ramp quickly and manage expectations across Product/other teams without surprises.
